programs.title: Would I Lie To You?
programs.sub_title: Shirley Ballas, Steven Bartlett, Josie Gibson And Chris Mccausland
programs.desc: Rob Brydon is back in the host's chair, with Lee Mack and David Mitchell returning as team captains. Sorting the fact from the fiction this week are guests Shirley Ballas, Steven Bartlett, Josie Gibson and Chris McCausland.

programs.title: Mythbusters
programs.desc: The MythBusters get down and dirty to test if using a bathroom's hand dryer is better than a paper towel and which public restroom stall is the cleanest. They also shake, rattle and roll to test if it's better to stand in the doorway during an earthquake.

programs.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programs.desc: In Staffordshire, Phil hopes to help Mark and Denise James find a buyer for their three bed semi. But Phil discovers a house full of clutter, a bathroom that's seen better days and a huge garden complete with cows. (Final).

programs.title: Grand Designs UK
programs.desc: Matt and Sophie White from Sussex want to build a giant house of fun for themselves and their three children, with secret stairs, hiding places and a fireman's pole. But Matt keeps changing the design.

programs.title: Claire Hooper's House Of Games
programs.desc: Staying over at Claire Hooper's House of Games this week, we've got actor Gyton Grantley, netballer Bianca Chatfield, and comedians Jenny Tian and Nazeem Hussain solving puzzles to earn a toilet seat and also a trophy.

programs.title: Spicks and Specks
programs.sub_title: Lara Goodridge, Brian Canham, Wilbur Wilde & Hamish Blake
programs.desc: Joining Adam Hills are Lara Goodridge, Brian Canham, Wilbur Wilde and Hamish Blake.
